title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 1
text: You’re at a gym and you want to use a treadmill, but they are all occupied. You see that one person has been on the same treadmill for more than an hour and they are not showing any signs of stopping. What would you say to the concerned person?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? I noticed that all the treadmills are currently occupied, and one person has been using the same treadmill for over an hour without showing signs of stopping. I understand that people can have different workout routines, but could you please assist me in finding a solution? I would really appreciate your help. Thanks for your understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 2
text: You have tried to register for a course online, but the system keeps showing an error message that says the course is full, even though you know there are still seats available. You are worried that you will miss the deadline and lose your chance to enroll in the course. You decide to talk to the administrator and ask for some help in completing your registration. What do you say to them?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? I’ve been trying to register for a course online, but the system keeps showing an error message that says the course is full, even though I know there are still seats available. I am worried that I will miss the deadline and lose my chance to enroll in the course. Could you please help me complete my registration? I would really appreciate your assistance. Thanks for your help!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 3
text: You have ordered a product online, but the delivery is delayed and you have not received any updates from the seller. You are worried that you will not get your product on time or at all. You decide to contact the seller and ask for some clarification and compensation. What do you say to them?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? I’ve ordered a product online, but the delivery is delayed and I haven’t received any updates from you. I’m worried that I might not get my product on time or at all. Could you please provide me with an update on the status of my order and discuss any possible compensation for the delay? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for your assistance!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 4
text: Imagine you are at a doctor’s office and you want to describe your symptoms and get some advice. What would you say to the doctor?
answer: Hi, I’ve been experiencing headaches for the past few weeks. I can't concentrate on my work. Could you please provide some advice on the best course of action? I would really appreciate your help. Thanks for your attention!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 5
text: You’re at a job interview and the interviewer asks you about your strengths and weaknesses. You have prepared some examples of your skills and achievements, but you are not sure how to answer the weakness question. What would you say to the interviewer?
answer: Thank you for the question. One of my weaknesses is that I sometimes have difficulty delegating tasks. I’ve been working on this by practicing better delegation. Could you please let me know if you have any advice or if this is something that aligns with the role? I would really appreciate your feedback.

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 6
text: You and your roommate have different sleeping schedules and preferences. Your roommate likes to stay up late and play loud music, while you prefer to go to bed early and have a quiet night. You have tried to talk to your roommate about this, but they have not been respectful of your needs. You are tired and stressed from the lack of sleep. You decide to talk to your resident advisor about the situation. What do you say to them?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? = My roommate and I have different sleeping schedules and preferences. They like to stay up late and play loud music, while I prefer to go to bed early and have a quiet night. I’ve tried to address this with my roommate, but they haven’t been respectful of my needs. I’m really tired and stressed from the lack of sleep. Could you please help me find a solution? I would really appreciate your assistance. Thanks for your help!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 7
text: You are at a library and you want to borrow a book to study for your exam that is coming up next week, but you do not have a library card. What will you say to convince the librarian in order to get the book as this is a very important exam for you?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? I need to borrow a book to study for an important exam coming up next week, but I don’t have a library card. I understand that library policies typically require a card, but this exam is very crucial for me. Could you please make an exception or suggest any way I can access the book for my studies? I would really appreciate your help. Thanks for understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 8
text: You are a guest speaker at a conference. You have prepared a presentation on a topic related to your field of expertise. However, when you arrive at the venue, you realize that the projector is not working. You have to deliver your presentation without any visual aids. What would you say to the organizer?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? I’ve prepared a presentation with visual aids, but I’ve just realized that the projector is not working. Could you please assist me with any available support or resources to help manage this issue? I would really appreciate your help. Thanks for your understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 9
text: You are a student in a group project. You have been assigned to do the research part of the project, but you are having trouble finding reliable sources. You have a meeting with your group members tomorrow to discuss your progress. What would you say to your group members about your research?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? I’ve been working on the research for our project, but I’m having trouble finding reliable sources. I understand this is an important part of our project, so I wanted to let you know about the difficulty I’m facing. Could we discuss potential solutions or ways to find additional resources during our meeting tomorrow? I would really appreciate your input and support. Thanks for understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 10
text: You have applied for a scholarship online, but you have not received any response from the committee after a month. You are worried that your application was rejected or ignored. You decided to call to follow up with the committee and ask for some feedback and status. What do you say to them?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? I have applied for a scholarship online, but I have not received any response from the committee after a month. I’m concerned that my application might have been missed or rejected. Could you please provide me with an update on the status of my application? I would really appreciate your assistance. Thanks for your help!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 11
text: You’re at a restaurant with your friends and you ordered a pizza. When the pizza arrives, you notice that it has mushrooms on it, which you are allergic to. You did not order mushrooms and you checked the menu carefully before ordering. What would you say to the waiter?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? I ordered a pizza. When the pizza arrived, I noticed that it had mushrooms on it, which I am allergic to. I didn’t order mushrooms and made sure to check the menu carefully. Could you please help me with getting a new pizza without mushrooms? I’d really appreciate it. Thanks for your assistance!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 12
text: You have booked a flight, but the confirmation email has the wrong dates and destinations. You are worried that you will be charged extra or miss your flight. You decide to call the airline help desk and ask for some corrections and confirmation. What do you say to them?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? I’ve booked a flight, but the confirmation email has the wrong dates and destinations. I’m concerned that this could lead to extra charges or that I might miss my flight. Could you please help me correct the details and confirm the correct information? I would really appreciate your assistance. Thanks for your help!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 13
text: You are part of a group project that requires a lot of research and creativity. You have a lot of ideas and resources to contribute, but your group members seem to ignore or dismiss them. You feel like your voice is not being heard or valued. You want to talk to your group members about this issue and persuade them to consider your input. What do you say to them?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? I have a lot of ideas and resources to contribute, but you seem to ignore or dismiss them. I understand we all have different perspectives, but I believe my input could really benefit the project. Could we please ensure that everyone’s ideas are given a fair review? I would really appreciate your consideration. Thanks for understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 14
text: You’re at a museum and you want to see a famous painting, but you see that there is a long line of people waiting to enter the gallery. You don’t have much time and you don’t want to miss the opportunity. You see the museum in-charge and decide to approach him. What would you tell him?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? I want to see a famous painting, but I see there is a long line of people waiting to enter the gallery. I don’t have much time and I don’t want to miss the opportunity. Could you please help me find a way to access the gallery sooner? I would really appreciate your assistance. Thanks for your help!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 15
text: You have booked a hotel online, but the confirmation email has the wrong dates and rates. You are worried that you will be charged extra or lose your reservation. You decide to call the hotel and ask for some correction and confirmation. What do you say to them?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? I have booked a room online, but the confirmation email has the wrong dates and rates. I am worried that I will be charged extra or lose my reservation. Could you please help me correct these details? I would really appreciate your assistance. Thanks for your help!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 16
text: You’ve been distracted and stressed by some personal issues lately, and you haven’t been able to focus on your studies. You’ve missed some lectures and assignments, and you’re not sure what you need to know for the exam. You’re afraid that your personal problems will affect your academic performance and your grade. You decide to talk to your professor and explain your situation and ask for some leniency or accommodation. What do you say to them?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? I have been distracted and stressed by some personal issues lately, and I have not been able to focus on my studies. I have also missed some lectures and assignments. I'm afraid that my personal problems will affect my academic performance and my grades. Can I ask for possible accommodations or any extra support? I would really appreciate your assistance. Thanks for your time!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 17
text: You have applied for a job online, but you have not heard back from the employer after two weeks. You are worried that your application was overlooked or rejected. You decide to follow up with the employer and ask for some feedback and status. What do you say to them?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? I have applied for a job online, but I have not heard back from you after two weeks. I am worried that my application was overlooked or rejected. Could you please provide me with an update on the status of my application? I would really appreciate your assistance. Thanks for your help!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 18
text: You're in your office on Monday morning and your manager asks you whether you can send her the sales report she asked for by Wednesday. You'd like extra time to finish it because the sales team can't send you the figures until tomorrow (Tuesday), a day later than you expected. What would you say to your colleague?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? I would like extra time to finish it because the sales team can not send me the figures until tomorrow. Given this delay, I’d like to ask for a bit more time to complete the report accurately. I would really appreciate your understanding. Thanks for your flexibility!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 19
text: You’re at a hotel and you want to check out, but you realize that you lost your room key. You don’t remember your room number and you don’t have any identification with you. What will you tell the receptionist in order to get this situation sorted?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? I want to check out, but I realize that I lost my room key. I do not remember my room number and I do not have any identification with me. Could you please help me sort this out? I would really appreciate your assistance. Thanks for your understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 20
text: You have submitted an assignment online, but the system shows that it was not received or graded. You are worried that you will lose marks or fail the course. You decide to call the instructor and ask for some verification and evaluation. What do you say to them?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? I have submitted an assignment online, but the system shows that it was not received or graded. I am worried that I will lose marks or fail the course. Could you please verify whether my assignment was received? I would really appreciate your assistance. Thanks for your help!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 21
text: Your professor has given unclear instructions for an assignment, and many students are confused. You need to ask for clarification on behalf of the class. What would you say to your professor?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? You have given unclear instructions for an assignment, and many students are confused. I want to ask if you could provide some clarification. It would really help us complete the assignment accurately. Thanks for your assistance!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 22
text: You’re in a study group and one member consistently does not contribute. You want to address this issue without causing conflict. What would you tell the group member?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? I’ve noticed that you consistently do not contribute to our study group sessions. I want to address this issue to ensure we all benefit equally from the group. Could you please make an effort to participate more? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for your cooperation!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 23
text: You’re planning a surprise birthday party for a friend, but another friend suggests a venue that is too expensive for everyone. What would you tell your friend?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? Your suggested vanue is too expensive for everyone. I want to find a more budget-friendly option that works for everyone. Could we please consider a different venue that’s more affordable? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 24
text: You’re at a restaurant, and the service is very slow. You want to speak to the manager about it. What would you tell the manager?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? The service is very slow in your restaurant. I want to address this issue to see if it can be resolved. Could you please look into the situation and help improve the service? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 25
text: You’re organizing a study group, and someone suggests meeting late at night, but you know some members might prefer an earlier time. What would you tell your group?
answer: Hi everyone, Can we talk for a moment? One suggestion was to meet late at night, but I know some members might prefer an earlier time. I want to make sure we find a time that works for everyone. Could we discuss a time that accommodates everyone’s preferences? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for your flexibility!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 26
text: You’re in a class where the teacher speaks too quickly, making it hard for you to take notes. You want to ask the teacher to slow down. What would you tell the teacher?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? You speak quite quickly during class, which makes it hard for me to take notes. I want to ask if you could please slow down a bit. It would really help me keep up with the material. Thanks for your understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 27
text: You're part of a volunteer group that meets every Saturday to clean up the local park. Recently, a few members have not been showing up, which makes it harder for the rest of the team. You need to remind them of their commitment. What would you say to your group?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? Recently, a few members haven’t been showing up for our Saturday park clean-up. I want to remind everyone of their commitment to the group. Could we please ensure we all attend as scheduled? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for your cooperation!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 28
text: Your neighbor’s outdoor light shines directly into your bedroom window, making it hard for you to sleep. You want to ask them to adjust the light. What would you say to your neighbor?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? Your outdoor light shines directly into my bedroom window, making it hard for me to sleep. Can you please adjust the light? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 29
text: You're organizing a community garden, and some members are not following the guidelines, leading to plants being damaged. You want to remind everyone of the rules. What would you say to your group?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? Some of us are not following the guidelines for the community garden, and it’s leading to damage to the plants. I want to remind everyone of the rules to ensure the garden remains healthy. Could we please all adhere to the guidelines? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for your cooperation!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 30
text: You’ve encountered technical glitches with the online administrative systems. These issues are affecting your course registration. You’re worried about the potential consequences. To resolve this, you decide to call customer support. What would you say to them?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? I’ve encountered technical glitches with the online administrative systems. These issues are affecting my course registration. I'm worried about the consequences. Could you please help me out? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 31
text: One of your family members wants to have a large party at your house, but you’re not comfortable with so many people. You need to suggest a compromise. What would you tell them?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? You want to have a large party at our house. But I’m not comfortable with so many people. Could you please think about it? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 32
text: Your colleague frequently leaves early, causing you to take on extra work to meet deadlines. You want to address this issue. What would you tell your colleague?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? You frequently leave early, so I have to take on extra work to meet deadlines. I want to address this issue so we can better manage our workload. Could you please try to stay until the end of the workday? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 33
text: Your friend keeps borrowing your notes for studying and returns them late, which affects your own study schedule. What would you tell your friend?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? You often borrow my notes for studying and return them late, which affects my own study schedule. I want to address this to help us both stay on track. Could you please return the notes on time? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 34
text: You’re organizing a workshop, and someone suggests having it in the evening. However, you know some participants have other commitments at that time. What would you tell the organizers?
answer: Hi everyone, Can we talk for a moment? Someone suggested having it in the evening. But, I know some participants have other commitments at that time. Could we please consider a different time that works for all? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for your cooperation!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 35
text: You’re at a concert, and the person in front of you is standing up and blocking your view. You want to ask them to sit down. What would you tell the person?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? You’re standing up frequently and blocking my view. I want to enjoy the concert fully and was wondering if you could please sit down? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 36
text: You’re organizing a charity event, and someone suggests having it at a high-end venue. However, you’re concerned about the budget. What would you tell the organizers?
answer: Hi everyone, Can we talk for a moment? Someone suggested having the charity event at a high-end venue. But, I am concerned about the budget. Could we please consider a more budget-friendly venue? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 37
text: You’re in a meeting, and a colleague frequently interrupts you while you’re speaking. You want to address this politely. What would you tell your colleague?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? You frequently interrupt me while I'm speaking in meetings. I want to address this so we can have a more productive discussion. Could you please allow me to finish my thoughts before responding? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 38
text: You’re planning a family vacation, and someone suggests going to a beach resort. However, you know one family member doesn’t enjoy the beach. What would you tell your family?
answer: Hi everyone, Can we talk for a moment? I'm planning a family vacation, and someone suggested going to a beach resort. However, I know one family member doesn’t enjoy the beach. Could you please help me out? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 39
text: You’re organizing a community event and someone suggests holding it outdoors. However, you know the weather can be unpredictable, and it might rain. What would you tell the organizers?
answer: Hi everyone, Can we talk for a moment? One of the suggestions is to hold the community event outdoors. However, the weather can be unpredictable, and it might rain. Could we consider having a backup plan or an alternative location in case of bad weather? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 40
text: Your friend borrows your belongings and doesn’t return them on time. You want to remind them to be punctual. What would you tell your friend?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? You often borrow my belongings and don't return them on time. I want to remind you to be punctual with returning items. Could you please make sure to return them by the agreed time? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 41
text: Your gym buddy often skips workout sessions, affecting your motivation. You want to encourage them to be more consistent. What would you tell your gym buddy?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? You often skip workout sessions and it's affecting my motivation. I understand that things come up, but I want to encourage you to be more consistent. Could you please try to stick to our workout schedule as much as possible? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 42
text: Your coworker talks loudly on the phone, disrupting your concentration. You want to ask them to lower their voice. What would you tell your coworker?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? You talk loudly on the phone, and it's disrupting my concentration. I understand you might not realize how loud it is, but could you please lower your voice? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 43
text: You are at a restaurant, and your food order is incorrect. You want to ask the waiter to correct it. What would you tell the waiter?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? I ordered food but my food order is incorrect. I understand mistakes can happen, but could you please correct it? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 44
text: Your coworker takes long breaks, affecting your team's productivity. You want to address this issue without causing tension. What would you tell your coworker?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? Our team's productivity is being affected by taking long breaks. I understand everyone needs a break, but could you please try to keep them within the allocated time? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 45
text: You found a mistake in a report that your colleague wrote. You want to point it out without making them feel bad. What would you tell your colleague?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? I found a mistake in the report you wrote. I understand that errors can happen, but I wanted to point it out so we can correct it. Could you please review it and make the necessary adjustments? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 46
text: You are unhappy with the service at your local gym and want to discuss it with the manager. What would you tell the manager?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? I am unhappy with the service at the local gym. I understand that issues can arise, but I want to discuss my concerns to see if they can be addressed. Could we please go over the specific issues I’ve encountered? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 47
text: You received a defective product from an online store and want to request a replacement. What would you say to the customer support representative?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? I received a defective product from your online store. I understand that issues can occur, but I would like to request a replacement. Could you please assist me with the process for getting a replacement item? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 48
text: Your roommate's friends come over often and stay late, disturbing your sleep. You want to ask your roommate to set some limits on visits. What would you tell your roommate?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? Your friends come over often and stay late, which is disturbing my sleep. I understand that you enjoy having them over, but could you please set some limits on their visits? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for understanding!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 49
text: You ordered a meal at a restaurant, but it arrived cold. You want to politely ask the waiter to replace it with a hot meal. What would you tell the waiter?
answer: Excuse me, can we talk for a moment? I ordered this meal, but it arrived cold. I understand that this can happen, but could you please replace it with a hot meal? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for your help!

title: Respond to a Situation Real Question 50
text: Your friend has been borrowing your car frequently and returning it with very little fuel. You want to address this issue without upsetting them. What would you tell your friend?
answer: Hi, Can we talk for a moment? You have been borrowing my car frequently and returning it with very little fuel. I understand that refueling can slip your mind, but could you please make sure to fill up the tank before returning it? I would really appreciate it. Thanks for understanding!
